# Specification

## Summary
**Goal:** Revert the business name across the entire site back to the original auto-generated name "RevRace Toys".

**Planned changes:**
- Update the Navbar logo/name to "RevRace Toys"
- Update the Hero section headline and tagline to reference "RevRace Toys"
- Update the About section brand copy to use "RevRace Toys"
- Update the Footer brand info to show "RevRace Toys"
- Update the page `<title>` in index.html to "RevRace Toys"

**User-visible outcome:** All instances of any previously renamed business name are replaced with "RevRace Toys" throughout the site, with no other visual or layout changes.
